name: Spiderling
description: Small aggressive spiders commonly found near orb weavers or released from web sacs. They do not hit especially hard, but they remain an easy source of web fiber and incidental pressure.
behavior: They stay close to their nests, alternating between patrolling, climbing webs, and sleeping. They move freely across web bridges and often react in chains if you disturb the area.
interactionWithPlayer: They become hostile as soon as they spot you and rush or jump to close the gap. Breaking a web sac can release several at once, though they can still be distracted with Spider Bait.
interactionWithCreatures: They are neutral toward most creatures, but they do not harm other spider-type enemies and share nesting space with orb weavers. In the Spider Den Anthill they often end up fighting red ants.
strategy: They die quickly to almost any weapon, but do not tunnel-vision on them. If you burst sacs or enter a nest, check for larger spiders before cleaning up the small ones.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: It rears back and performs a simple blockable bite.
